message:
feat(vc_tui): migrate theme and widgets from ratatui to ftui primitives

theme.rs:
- Introduce ThemeColors struct using ftui::Color (AdaptiveColor) as canonical palette source
- Theme now wraps both legacy ratatui::Color fields and ftui ThemeColors
- Add ftui_colors() accessor and ThemeBuilder-based ftui_theme() factory
- health_color() returns ftui::Color; ratatui conversion via to_ratatui() helper
- PackedRgba conversion helpers for ftui style interop

widgets.rs:
- Rewrite section_header, health_badge, status_indicator, sparkline,
  progress_bar, key_value_row, truncate_with_ellipsis to target ftui primitives
- health_badge now returns ftui Badge widget instead of a Span
- status_indicator uses ftui Span/Style
- Add spinner_widget() returning ftui Spinner with SpinnerState
- All helpers consume Theme.ftui_colors() for color resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
